sections.paragraph: (“a place of hornets”), [Zorah], pr.n. of a town in the plain country of Judah, but inhabited by the Danites, Jos 15:33 19:41 Jdg 13:2. [Apparently now called Sŭrʾah, صرعه, Rob. ii. 343.] The Gent. noun is צָרְעִי [Zorites], 1Ch 2:54 and צָרְעָתִי [Zareathites, Zorathites], 1Ch 2:53 4:2 .
